title: OPCraftables
description: A cursed yet op datapack that allows you to craft uncraftable and op items earlier in the game. Made using MCreator
body:
OPCraftables is an overpowered datapack that not only allows you to craft certain uncraftable items such as Elytra or Totems, but also allows you to craft overpowered items like diamond blocks using early game items. So if you're looking for a data pack that makes the game way easier than it already is, but cannot seem to find one, then this pack will be for you. Feel free to add this pack to any mod or modpack as long as you give me credit. 
Currently there are 22 Crafting recipes. A few of them are mentioned in the gallery. But here are a few more.

Seeds = 20 Gunpowder,
Gunpowder + Paper = 32 firework rockets,
Diamond Block + yellow dye = Gold Block,
Ancient Debris = 4 Netherite Blocks,
Gold Block + Green Dye = 32 Emerald Blocks




This datapack also adds a new overpowered enchantment, biome, and creative only dimension because I got bored.
